channel.title: GrantOtter — Federal Funding Updates
channel.description: Aggregated weekly feed of grant opportunities and agency news from NIH, NSF, and DARPA.

item.title: Make a Perfect Pair with NIH Matchmaker
item.description: Our Matchmaker tool in RePORTER can help you determine which institute or center may be interested in your idea, which NIH program official you may want to contact, and which study section you might suggest for application review.

item.title: Notice of Information Encouraging Submission of Pre-Application Consultation Information for RFA-OD-25-008, "Tobacco Regulatory Science Small Grant Program for New Investigators (R03 Clinical Trial Optional)"
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-045 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: SBIR: ALIAS Missionized Autonomy for Emergency Services - SBIR XL
item.description: This topic invites submissions of innovative research concepts in the technical domain of Human-Machine Interfaces, Integrated Sensing and Cyber, Trusted AI and Autonomy. | See Topic

item.title: Highlighted Topics Spotlight: Cancer Research
item.description: Have you explored the NIH Highlighted Topics recently? If not, now is a great time to take a look and learn more about this centralized list of selected research priority areas within the NIH Institutes, Centers, and Offices (ICOs).

item.title: NSF-DOE Vera C. Rubin Observatory launches real-time discovery machine for monitoring the night sky
item.description: NSF-DOE Rubin Observatory has issued its first scientific alerts, enabling dynamic, real-time observation of the night sky. The alerts are expected to increase to about 7 million per night...

item.title: Updated Elements of an NIH Data Management and Sharing Plan
item.description: Notice NOT-OD-26-046 from the NIH Guide for Grants and Contracts

item.title: Survey Results: Reducing Time and Effort in NIH-Supported Laboratory Animal Research, Testing, and Training
item.description: These Survey Results help inform NIH’s ongoing efforts to reduce time and effort spent by Institutional Animal Care and Use Committee (IACUC) administrators and principal investigators (PIs) while maintaining the integrity and credibility of research findings and protection of research animals.

item.title: NSF to proceed with demolition and site restoration at Sacramento Peak Observatory
item.description: The U.S. National Science Foundation announced today it will proceed with demolition and site restoration at the Sacramento Peak Observatory, also known as Sunspot Solar Observatory, in Sunspot, New Mexico, following years of reduced operations and…

item.title: NIH Institute and Center Director Perspectives on Implementing the NIH Unified Funding Strategy
item.description: Last November, NIH announced it is implementing steps towards a unified strategy that will help guide clearer and consistent funding decisions across all Institutes and Centers (ICs). The August NIH Director’s statement laid the foundation, and today we are sharing our thoughts on this NIH Unified Funding Strategy (UFS) from a holistic NIH viewpoint first, and then how this approach aligns with our individual Institute or Center (IC) established funding practices.
